title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.205 - National Girls and Women in Sports Day designated for first week in February
text:
9.205.  National Girls and Women in Sports Day designated for first week in February. — The first week of February is hereby designated as "National Girls and Women in Sports Day" in Missouri.  Citizens of this state are encouraged to recognize the day with appropriate events and activities to express appreciation for girls and women in sports.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 § 3)
